selections.name: All Of It
selections.reason: Top connections with Franco and Clement. Shows strong class ratings and draws well inside on the inner turf course where ground loss is penalized.

selections.name: Neshika
selections.reason: Prat takes the mount for Maker. Consistently hits high speed figures (106) and possesses the tactical speed necessary to secure a good trip.

selections.name: Boomington
selections.reason: Velazquez rides for Weaver. Has flashed strong late pace figures and will benefit if the early fractions get contested.

selections.name: Considerate City
selections.reason: Massive post advantage drawing the rail on the inner turf. Dylan Davis can save all the ground and strike late for a piece.

danger_horse.name: Cosmic Candy Girl
danger_horse.reason: Carmouche aboard. Has the class rating to compete here and could offer value underneath.

selections.name: Soaring Spirit
selections.reason: Clement and Franco team up here. Boasts an elite 117 class rating and 105 speed figure, making her a prime contender in this maiden field.

selections.name: New York Special
selections.reason: Mark Casse trainee draws perfectly inside. Has the tactical speed to secure position early and save ground around the tight turns.

selections.name: Pelican Pride
selections.reason: Velazquez rides for Cherie DeVaux. Strong 114 class rating indicates she has been facing tougher company and fits well here.

selections.name: Coach Of The Year
selections.reason: Lezcano and Weaver connection. Shows steady improvement and has the foundation to handle the route distance.

danger_horse.name: Factory Setting
danger_horse.reason: Chad Brown and Flavien Prat are always dangerous on the turf, despite the slightly lower speed figures.

selections.name: Scottish Lassie
selections.reason: Massive class edge having placed in Grade 1 company (Frizette, Acorn). Prat rides for Abreu. Should dominate this field with her 118 class rating.

selections.name: Filly Freedom
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with Franco up. Consistent runner with a 115 class rating who will be closing hard if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Limes Don't Lie
selections.reason: Another Chad Brown entry. Draws the rail and has the tactical speed to work out a ground-saving trip under Dylan Davis.

selections.name: Autumn Evening
selections.reason: Draws outside and possesses strong early speed. Could get brave if left alone on the lead.

danger_horse.name: Roman Grace
danger_horse.reason: Linda Rice trainee with Santana. Capable of hitting the board at a price.

selections.name: Zulu Kingdom (ire)
selections.reason: Elite turf runner for Chad Brown with Prat aboard. Boasts a 121 class rating and 112 speed. Draws perfectly to stalk and pounce.

selections.name: Salamis
selections.reason: Another strong Brown entry with Franco. 114 class rating and excellent recent form makes him the primary threat to the favorite.

selections.name: Capitol Hill
selections.reason: Mott trainee with Junior Alvarado. Has flashed brilliant speed (115) and can control the pace from an inside draw.

selections.name: Ignite The Light
selections.reason: Dutrow runner with solid class figures. Will need to overcome the outside post but has the talent to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Pass The Hat
danger_horse.reason: Mott's second entry. Consistent runner who could pick up the pieces if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Moonlight Drive
selections.reason: Abreu trainee with Dylan Davis. Highest class rating in the field (120) and strong speed figures (113). Should get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: On The Ledge
selections.reason: Prat rides for Bruce Brown. Consistent turf sprinter with the tactical speed to stay out of trouble from the outside draw.

selections.name: Three Thirteen
selections.reason: Shows excellent speed figures (111) and class (111). Can be very dangerous if allowed to dictate terms.

selections.name: Joker On Fire
selections.reason: Lezcano aboard for Levine. Solid recent form and fits well at this level.

danger_horse.name: Truman's Commander
danger_horse.reason: Mark Casse runner drawing inside. Could save ground and sneak into the exotics at a price.

selections.name: Booked
selections.reason: Asmussen 2yo with Santana. Shows a strong 117 class rating and 101 speed. Outside draw is fine for a 2yo sprint where early speed is key.

selections.name: Just A Holiday
selections.reason: Wesley Ward is lethal with 2yo debut runners. Dylan Davis takes the mount. Must respect the connections.

selections.name: Pinpoint
selections.reason: Pletcher first-timer with Flavien Prat. Excellent pedigree and works suggest readiness.

selections.name: Beach Sandals
selections.reason: Mark Casse trainee with Velazquez. Solid class rating (117) and should show early foot.

danger_horse.name: Motawaali
danger_horse.reason: Mott runner with Alvarado. Could be closing late if the early pace is too hot.

selections.name: Gene And Jude
selections.reason: Maker trainee gets Prat. Boasts a 115 speed figure and 106 class rating. Inside draw on the inner turf is a major advantage.

selections.name: Complex Agenda
selections.reason: Draws the rail, which is gold on this course. Santana rides for Morley. Has the tactical speed to secure a perfect trip.

selections.name: Final Denile
selections.reason: Franco aboard for De Paz. Consistent runner with a 105 class rating. Will be a factor in the stretch.

selections.name: The Paddock Pastor
selections.reason: Strong speed figures (109) but must overcome the far outside post. If he can tuck in early, he's a threat.

danger_horse.name: Bridle A Butterfly
danger_horse.reason: Carmouche rides. Has back class and could wake up at a price.

selections.name: Slay The Day
selections.reason: Lynch trainee with Velazquez. Dominant 115 class rating and 114 speed. The clear horse to beat in this Grade 3.

selections.name: Niche
selections.reason: Atras runner with Dylan Davis. Draws outside but has the tactical speed to stay out of trouble and finish strong.

selections.name: Hen Party
selections.reason: Prat rides from the rail. Will save all the ground and has the class (108) to hit the board.

selections.name: Cadenza
selections.reason: Brad Cox entry with Franco. Strong 115 class rating makes her a must-use in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Kingsolver
danger_horse.reason: Santana rides. Capable of popping a big figure on her best day.

selections.name: Private Desire
selections.reason: Morley trainee with Santana. Strong 107 speed figure and 103 class rating. Should get a good stalking trip from the middle of the gate.

selections.name: Shoot The Nickel
selections.reason: Linda Rice and Prat team up. Outside draw keeps him out of kickback. Has the class (104) to win this.

selections.name: Gatsby
selections.reason: Franco rides from the rail. High speed figure (107) and class (105). Will be dangerous if he breaks cleanly.

selections.name: Secured Landing
selections.reason: Another Linda Rice entry with Carmouche. Consistent runner who fits well at this level.

danger_horse.name: Forgiving Spirit
danger_horse.reason: Silvera rides. Has back class and could surprise if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Long Pour
selections.reason: Lezcano rides for Arnold. Top speed figure (109) and class rating (107). Outside draw allows for a clean, stalking trip.

selections.name: Bold Love
selections.reason: Santana aboard. Consistent runner with a 107 speed figure. Should be prominently placed early.

selections.name: Mo For The King
selections.reason: Velazquez rides. Solid class rating (105) and has the tactical speed to be a factor.

selections.name: Toscano
selections.reason: Prat and Maker connection. Draws the rail and will save ground. Capable of hitting the board.

danger_horse.name: Anyway
danger_horse.reason: Rodriguez rides. Has shown flashes of ability and could offer value underneath.

selections.name: Irish Goodbye
selections.reason: Brad Cox trainee with Franco. High class rating (117) and solid speed (101). Outside draw is favorable for this distance.

selections.name: King Farro
selections.reason: Carmouche rides. Boasts a massive 112 speed figure and 114 class rating. The primary threat to the top pick.

selections.name: Ice House
selections.reason: Velazquez and Weaver team up. Draws the rail and has the early speed to protect position.

selections.name: Roadie
selections.reason: Pletcher runner with Prat. Must respect the connections despite slightly lower speed figures.

danger_horse.name: Bossofeverything
danger_horse.reason: Zayas rides. Could pick up the pieces if the early pace is contested.
